levelList.name: 无法洗清的罪…
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加20級[Laceration]強度并対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加1層[Laceration]

levelList.name: 應得的懲罰…
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加20級[Laceration]強度并対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加1層[Laceration]

levelList.name: 今天有想過血麼？
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加10級[Laceration]強度
[WhenUse] 消耗最多30層[BloodDinner]，并使現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>最低的1名<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>(本体与<color=#ffffff>部位</color>)恢復(消耗的[BloodDinner]層数×2)点<color=#61DA61>体力</color>(不包括<color=#ffffff>自身</color>;向下取整)

levelList.name: 還在想着血麼？
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加10級[Laceration]強度
[WhenUse] 消耗最多20層[BloodDinner]，并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>与現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>最低的1名<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>(本体与<color=#ffffff>部位</color>)恢復(消耗的[BloodDinner]層数×2)点<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
- 若没有剩余<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>存活，則改為使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>変為2倍

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 若現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>不低于50%，則触発<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]。消耗<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的1層[Laceration]
[OnSucceedAttack] 若[WornHeart]的層数為10層，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>額外獲得3層[BloodyHand]，<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[AttackUp]

levelList.name: 更多的血…！
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 消耗最多50層[BloodDinner]，每消耗10層[BloodDinner]，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[BloodyHand]
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加10級[Laceration]強度
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得3層[BloodyHand]

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有5級[Laceration]強度，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[BloodyHand](最多5層)

levelList.name: 如此豊富…
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]強度不低于6級，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1
[WhenUse] 消耗最多30層[BloodDinner]，每消耗10層[BloodDinner]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(第1枚硬幣攻撃結束后解除本效果)
[DefeatDuel] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加1層[Vulnerable]

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復相当于本硬幣<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>量的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>(最多30点)
[OnSucceedAttack] 若本技能消耗了30層[BloodDinner]，且<color=#ffffff>自身</color>帯有的[BloodyHand_3rd]的層数不低于30層，則<color=#ffffff>重復使用</color>本硬幣1次
- 若本技能未消耗[BloodDinner]，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加20級[Laceration]強度

levelList.name: 為家族的犠牲
levelList.desc:
[StartBattle] 若現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>不低于50%，則触発<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration](最多3次;根据触発的[Laceration]次数，相應使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]層数減少;不会因該<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>而陷入混乱)
[StartBattle] 使<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>恢復5点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>(包括<color=#ffffff>自身</color>)

levelList.name: 血…
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]強度不低于6級，則使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+20%

levelList.name: 表達愛意
levelList.desc:
優先指定負面状態数最少的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>未帯有負面状態，則<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使用“粗暴示愛”

[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有的負面状態数高于<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[FaintMemory]層数，則<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使用“悲傷的擁抱”

levelList.name: 撕撓

優先指定負面状態数最少的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
[WinDuel] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加3層[AffectionTeddy]
[DefeatDuel] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加1層[AffectionTeddy]

levelList.name: 狂乱横掃

levelList.name: 謹慎示愛

[DuelCounter]
[WhenUse] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加2層[Disarming]
[WhenUse] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加1層詛咒

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有[AffectionTeddy]，則消耗<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[AffectionTeddy]并対其施加相應層数的詛咒 与[NailPersonality](最多消耗4層)
[OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Curse]層数不低于4層，則消耗其4層[Curse]并対其施加1層[CursePackage]

[CantChangeTarget]
指定上回合与“表達愛意”拼点的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>

coindescs.desc: 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>未帯有負面状態，則使本硬幣造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+100%

対該<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>固定為0点

levelList.name: 思念的擁抱

coindescs.desc:

[OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加4級[Laceration]強度并対其施加2層[Laceration]

levelList.name: 血之歓喜
levelList.desc:
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点
[StartBattle] 若有<color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>帯有[Laceration]，則立即触発<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>的[Laceration]并使<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>的[Laceration]層数減少2層
[WhenUse] 若本技能的<color=#ffffff>戦斗開始</color>時效果未触発，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加30級[Laceration]強度。
[WinDuel] 消耗最多40層[BloodDinner]，每消耗10層[BloodDinner]，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[BloodArmor]并使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+25% (最多+100%)
- 若本技能未消耗[BloodDinner]，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加5級[Laceration]強度，立即触発<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]層数減少2層
[EndSkill] 結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加5級[Laceration]強度并対其施加2層[Laceration]
[OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加5級[Laceration]強度并対其施加2層[Laceration]

levelList.name: 堂吉訶德派硬血2式-硬血
levelList.desc:
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点
[StartBattle] 消耗200層[BloodDinner]并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得500点<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>，5層[BloodArmor]与1層[SwirlingBlood]
- 若[BloodDinner]層数不足，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加50級[Laceration]強度，立即触発<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]1次并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]層数減少2層。随后使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得500点<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>，5層[BloodArmor]与1層[SwirlingBlood](該<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>低于1)
[WinDuel] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得200点<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>
[DefeatDuel] 帯有通過本技能獲得的<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>時，対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加3層[Vulnerable]
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱
[EndSkill] 結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>
